title: Zargabad low-pop mission release smoke plan
steps: Start hosted or dedicated Zargabad and verify no init hang through WFBE_Parameters_Ready, commonInitComplete, townInit, serverInitFull and clientInitComplete.
Confirm 13 town markers, 19 camp markers and one airfield objective are present and positioned according to Guides/Zargabad-Low-Pop-Release-Audit.md.
Join a second client after time > 30 and confirm current town/camp colors and SV visibility rules are preserved.
Inspect WEST southwest and EAST northeast starts for direct spawn-to-spawn fire, spawn-to-city fire and hill-edge overwatch abuse.
Inspect the WDDM-compatible central H-barrier wall around 3425,3375 and confirm the pass-through gaps preserve normal infantry, light armor and AI movement.

Drive a ground vehicle into the outer Zargabad rim away from starts/towns/camps/airport and confirm Zargabad_EdgeGuard removes it after the configured timeout, while aircraft and objective-near ground fights are ignored.
Verify WEST/EAST Zargabad fortifications and statics spawn, are side-owned, manned, and do not block commander construction in normal base flow.
Wake city, airfield and one outer farm with ground units; confirm town AI and static defenses activate, fight, and clean up after inactivity.
Capture camps and then a town from both WEST and EAST; confirm camp/town SV drains, resets on capture, and income ticks reflect ownership.
Buy representative infantry, light, heavy, aircraft and airport units; confirm Zargabad lists exclude MBTs/heavy attack aircraft and price multipliers feel sane.
Own Zargabad Airfield as WEST or EAST and wait for the black-market cache event; confirm crate/smoke spawn, ownership gating and cleanup.
Run one HC-enabled smoke if headless client is used by the server and confirm town AI/static defense behavior does not regress.
expected: Mission boots without undefined variable, missing file, sync id or townInit errors in server/client RPT.
All town/camp/airport/start logics remain inside the 6000m Zargabad boundary.
Central city, market, districts and airfield are the high-value flow; farms/outskirts remain lower-value flank objectives.
Spawn areas require movement/scouting to attack and are not trivially suppressed from the opposing spawn or side hills.
The central wall interrupts flat middle sightlines without sealing the map or trapping AI pathing.
Extreme-rim ground camping is server-enforced without punishing legitimate objective fights near the northern/eastern settlements.
Smaller-map economy reduces vehicle/air spam while preserving infantry and IFV fights.
The black-market cache is fun but not match-breaking.

evidence.summary: LoadoutManager generation completed with A2WASP_SKIP_ZIP=1; packaging skipped because 7za is not required for local propagation.
dotnet build Tools/LoadoutManager/LoadoutManager.csproj --no-restore completed with existing warnings and 0 errors.
Zargabad_EdgeGuard is server-only, Zargabad-gated, skips Air vehicles, exempts nearby starts/towns/camps/airport and uses the 6000m boundary plus a 120m rim band.

Tools/Validate-ZargabadMission.ps1 passed: no duplicate ids, all sync ids resolvable, expected town/camp/airport/start/defense counts, no out-of-6000 logic positions, start SV 185, max SV 648, all towns have camps and defenses, synchronized defenses sit in the 90m-325m town approach band, high-value objectives have layered defense coverage, WDDM-compatible central wall template/gaps are present, and no Takistan Zargabad module spillover.

Tools/Validate-ZargabadRuntimeEvidence.ps1 is ready for Claude/runtime RPT validation and checks server/town/Zargabad/edge-guard/runtime-audit init, expected runtime count/SV/base/fortification/factory restriction/price multiplier/economy/range evidence, optional JIP/HC/edge-removal/black-market evidence, and common missing-script/dependency/expression failures.

Tools/New-ZargabadRuntimeReport.ps1 generates a Codex-ready markdown report with gate state, base/fortification audit state, failure scan, key RPT excerpts, validator output, and a structured Claude Notes verdict table requiring PASS/FAIL/UNCERTAIN plus concrete evidence for ambiguous or failing runtime checks.

Zargabad_RuntimeAudit logs runtime towns/camps/airports/defenses, start/max SV totals, WEST/EAST base positions and separation, base static/wall counts, factory restriction counts, price multiplier/sample values, and smaller-map economy/range/base-defense/edge-guard constants into RPT.
Init_Zargabad builds WFBE_ZARGABAD_CENTRAL_WALL through CreateDefenseTemplate with six separated H-barrier spans centered at 3425,3375 and angled 316 degrees across the flat middle.

Static mission validation found unique ids, all sync ids resolvable, zero out-of-6000 logic positions, 13 towns, 19 camps, 1 airport, 33 defense logics, defense approach distances inside 90m-325m, start SV 185 and max SV 648.

notes: Source-only and local-tool evidence passed. Hosted/dedicated/JIP/HC Arma 2 OA runtime smoke remains required before this goal can be marked complete. Claude/runtime testers should use Guides/Zargabad-Claude-Runtime-Handoff.md, Tools/Validate-ZargabadRuntimeEvidence.ps1, and Tools/New-ZargabadRuntimeReport.ps1 for RPT evidence and Codex-ready status reports.
